content: Premier Choice was founded in 2011 by Amran Zia in Dubai, UAE. The company soon expanded to Islamabad, Pakistan and has been in a phase of hyper-growth ever since. Our client-centric approach combined with industry leading design and process engineering drives us to continuously deliver superior quality developments and services — ensuring collective success for all stakeholders. With over a decade of experience in both local and global real estate markets, the team at Premier Choice International has dedicated themselves to establishing and executing procedures that guarantee optimal efficiency and top-notch construction practices. The ISO 9001:2015 certification is a testament to our commitment to providing superior quality solutions and ensuring client satisfaction. We are proud to have achieved this certification, which has earned us international recognition for our endeavors to become the largest and most reputable developer in the region. The title of the picture will come here EFFICIENCY INNOVATION SUSTAINABILITY LOCALITY IMPACTFUL COLLABORATIONS At Premier Hospitality, our commitment to hospitality extends beyond providing mere accommodation; we strive to elevate your investment or stay to new heights. In the realm of investments, Premier Hospitality offers a lucrative opportunity by managing your property with a seasoned team deeply rooted in the hospitality industry. With our extensive experience in hotel management, we ensure that your investment yields optimal returns. We understand the nuances of the real estate and hospitality market in both Pakistan and the UAE, enabling us to navigate challenges and capitalize on opportunities. Our Philosophy We follow brand guidelines, not rigid standards, fostering flexibility and collaboration in each project. We transform hospitality concepts into tangible, community-built destinations with a contemporary aesthetic A single operator responsible for each concept’s overall performance in mixed-use development. We optimize costs and space for investor returns, creating versatile, functional, and social spaces benefiting local communities. PREMIER HOSPITALITY

We take immense pride in our commitment to innovation, a cornerstone of our approach to facilities management. By harnessing the latest cutting- edge technologies and embracing industry best practices, we consistently deliver solutions that not only optimize the efficiency and sustainability of the facilities entrusted to our care but also elevate their overall performance. At the heart of our ethos lies a dedication to excellence, manifested in our unwavering pursuit of surpassing the expectations of our clients. We go beyond mere maintenance, striving to create environments that serve as catalysts for their operational success. Our premier facilities stand as a testament to this dedication, reflecting the depth of our expertise and our relentless pursuit of perfection. Central to our success is our dynamic team, comprising individuals who blend a wealth of expertise in customer service with a meticulous approach to facility management. Through their unwavering commitment to excellence, they ensure that every aspect of our service is finely tuned to deliver unparalleled levels of satisfaction and comfort. In essence, our mission is clear: to not only meet but exceed the needs of our clients by crafting environments that are not just well-maintained, but actively contribute to their success. We are driven by a passion for excellence, and it is this drive that fuels our relentless pursuit of perfection in every facility we manage. PREMIER FACILITIES MANAGEMENT ADD A CATCHY TAG LINE HERE.

Property Development PCI has a fully equipped & an integrated Project Management Office, headed by the Projects Director, to cater the property development under one roof. PMO has the following departments, Design Department – It is responsible for state of the art Architectural, Structural and MEP, both the conceptual and detailed engineering designs. The department is headed by qualified engineers & professionals registered with respective profession regulating bodies like, PCATP (Pakistan Council or Architecture & Town Planning & PEC (Pakistan Engineering Council). Planning Department – Headed by Professional planning engineers, who meticulously plan the project life cycles, for timely delivery of the property to the respectable clients. Procurement & Stores Department – The department headed by the procurement manager ensure timely procurement so as to facilitate the uninterrupted project execution. Quantity Surveying Department – Headed by a Chief Quantity Surveyor, plays a pivotal role of project estimation, budgeting and billing during the project’s life cycle. Quality Assurance and Quality Control Department – It is headed by an engineer with an extensive experience in the field of constructions supported by equally able QA/QC engineers. The department ensures that the quality of the construction at any stage, doesn’t get compromised. Execution Supervision Department - Each project is supervised and monitored by a team of professionals headed by a Project Manager. PM mandatorily has the relevant educational qualifications, knowledge, experience and the skills for timely delivery of the project. The project management performs a very important function of the project management by close coordination with all the supporting departments. Safety Department - It ensures the people working on the project take all safety measures to remain safe while at site by using all the safety gears per the norms of standard safety practices. It is headed by a professional having relevant certification. PCI has issued a safety manual and abiding by it’s contents is deemed as mandatory.
